{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Audit and Control Officer",
  "description": "Source Microfinance Bank is a digital bank with a focus on how to serve you better always! At Source Credit, we have our plans to serve you better right at the center of all we do, and our service offerings. We also ensure we give the best customer service experience that is tailored just for you. Source Microfinance Bank is poised to change the face of banking in Nigeria. We are reinventing banking to empower a generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Internal Audit and Control Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Job Type:&nbsp;Full-Time

Role Overview


	We are looking for an experienced Internal Audit &amp; Control to join our dynamic team. This is a full-time hybrid role as an Internal Audit &amp; Control located in Lagos with some remote work possible.
	The Internal Audit &amp; Control will be responsible for maintaining a strong internal control environment by reviewing and monitoring the efficiency and effectiveness of operations, reliability of financial reporting, compliance with applicable laws and regulations, and safeguarding of company assets.
	The role holder will collaborate with other departments as well as external auditors and regulators to ensure compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements.


Role Description


	Conduct audit of existing processes, procedure and compliance level and recommend reviews and bridge compliance gaps
	Conduct credit and portfolio reviews
	Conduct regulatory and compliance oversights&nbsp;
	Adequate communication of changes in internal process from time to time to stakeholders and users
	Conduct required checks to ascertain processes are implemented as per KYC, expenditures etc
	Audit reporting, follow-up and closure
	Conduct follow up review of financial, operational, or regulatory/compliances deficiencies observed during audits, regulators&rsquo; assessments&nbsp;
	Attain visible and measurable process improvements


Role Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	Minimum of 5 years in internal control, audit and/or compliance
	Candidate must be CIBN certified i.e., obtained MCIB along with other role relevant certification(s)
	Experience working in Microfinance Bank and understanding of CBN stipulated ratio, standards, reporting and other relevant guideline is a must have
	Strong knowledge of auditing standards and principles, financial accounting principles, applicable laws, and regulation
	Previous and proven usage of Microsoft office, accounting and core banking solutions is essential for the role holder&nbsp;
	Proven experience in financial analysis and reporting
	Experience working with start-up is an advantage but not compulsory
	Excellent verbal and written communication and presentation skills is required
	Candidate must possess the ability to work independently and part of a team, should be a self-starter
	The desired candidate is expected to be primarily highly proactive and corrective in approach.&nbsp;
	Excellent analytical, strategic thinking, and problem-solving skills.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-06",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-07",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Source Microfinance Bank"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "197009"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Internal Audit and Control Officer Job at Source Microfinance Bank




        
    

        
        Source Microfinance Bank is a digital bank with a focus on how to serve you better always! At Source Credit, we have our plans to serve you better right at the center of all we do, and our service offerings. We also ensure we give the best customer service experience that is tailored just for you. Source Microfinance Bank is poised to change the face of banking in Nigeria. We are reinventing banking to empower a generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Audit and Control Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-Time

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for an experienced Internal Audit & Control to join our dynamic team. This is a full-time hybrid role as an Internal Audit & Control located in Lagos with some remote work possible.
	The Internal Audit & Control will be responsible for maintaining a strong internal control environment by reviewing and monitoring the efficiency and effectiveness of operations, reliability of financial reporting, compliance with applicable laws and regulations, and safeguarding of company assets.
	The role holder will collaborate with other departments as well as external auditors and regulators to ensure compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements.


Role Description


	Conduct audit of existing processes, procedure and compliance level and recommend reviews and bridge compliance gaps
	Conduct credit and portfolio reviews
	Conduct regulatory and compliance oversights 
	Adequate communication of changes in internal process from time to time to stakeholders and users
	Conduct required checks to ascertain processes are implemented as per KYC, expenditures etc
	Audit reporting, follow-up and closure
	Conduct follow up review of financial, operational, or regulatory/compliances deficiencies observed during audits, regulators’ assessments 
	Attain visible and measurable process improvements


Role Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	Minimum of 5 years in internal control, audit and/or compliance
	Candidate must be CIBN certified i.e., obtained MCIB along with other role relevant certification(s)
	Experience working in Microfinance Bank and understanding of CBN stipulated ratio, standards, reporting and other relevant guideline is a must have
	Strong knowledge of auditing standards and principles, financial accounting principles, applicable laws, and regulation
	Previous and proven usage of Microsoft office, accounting and core banking solutions is essential for the role holder 
	Proven experience in financial analysis and reporting
	Experience working with start-up is an advantage but not compulsory
	Excellent verbal and written communication and presentation skills is required
	Candidate must possess the ability to work independently and part of a team, should be a self-starter
	The desired candidate is expected to be primarily highly proactive and corrective in approach. 
	Excellent analytical, strategic thinking, and problem-solving skills.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Our reputation as a highly responsive, client-focused establishment stems from extensive Tier 1 and large corporation experience With over 7000 team members, we work across all major sectors including: Oil and Gas, marine, FMCG, and government.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Mechanical Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos

Job Description


	We are currently looking to recruit Mechanical Engineers to be based in the main office.
	Preparing of shopdwgusing Autocad software
	Take off materials
	Assist the MEP engineer in preparing material submittal


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor of Engineering (B.Eng) with a minimum of 5 years of experience in building construction projects.
	Knowledge of mechanical design using Autocadsoftware
	The ideal candidate should have a background in the building construction.


Salary Expectation
N500,000 - N600,000 / Month (Net) + other benefits

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;humanresourcesrecruitment04@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of email.",

Mechanical Engineer Job at Craneburg Construction Company




        
    

        
        Craneburg Construction Company is one of Nigeria’s largest, most diversified private construction groups. Our reputation as a highly responsive, client-focused establishment stems from extensive Tier 1 and large corporation experience With over 7000 team members, we work across all major sectors including: Oil and Gas, marine, FMCG, and government.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Mechanical Engineer

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are currently looking to recruit Mechanical Engineers to be based in the main office.
	Preparing of shopdwgusing Autocad software
	Take off materials
	Assist the MEP engineer in preparing material submittal


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor of Engineering (B.Eng) with a minimum of 5 years of experience in building construction projects.
	Knowledge of mechanical design using Autocadsoftware
	The ideal candidate should have a background in the building construction.


Salary Expectation
N500,000 - N600,000 / Month (Net) + other benefits

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of email.

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Product Analyst",
  "description": "Source Microfinance Bank is a digital bank with a focus on how to serve you better always! At Source Credit, we have our plans to serve you better right at the center of all we do, and our service offerings. We also ensure we give the best customer service experience that is tailored just for you. Source Microfinance Bank is poised to change the face of banking in Nigeria. We are reinventing banking to empower a generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Product Analyst

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Job Type:&nbsp;Full-Time

Job Description
Product Management:


	Product Strategy &amp; Roadmap: Define the product vision, strategy, and roadmap for digital channels (mobile app, USSD, internet banking) and internal operational tools in alignment with business goals.
	Market Research: Conduct competitor analysis and market research to identify trends, customer pain points, and opportunities for innovation in the microfinance space.
	Backlog Ownership: Own and prioritize the product backlog, balancing business value, technical feasibility, and regulatory requirements.
	Performance Monitoring: Define Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for products (e.g., adoption rates, transaction volumes, user satisfaction) and use data to drive iterative improvements.
	Go-to-Market Support: Collaborate with marketing and operations to launch new features, create training materials, and ensure successful adoption by both staff and customers.


Business Analysis:


	Requirements Elicitation: Work with stakeholders (Credit, Operations, Risk, Finance) to capture detailed functional and non-functional requirements for new features and system enhancements.
	Process Optimization: Analyze current workflows within the Core Banking System (CBS) and lending processes, identifying bottlenecks and recommending automated solutions.
	Documentation: Translate product vision into detailed user stories, Business Requirement Documents (BRDs), and Functional Specifications for the development team.
	Stakeholder Communication: Act as the primary liaison between business units and the technical team, ensuring clear communication and managing expectations throughout the development cycle.
	UAT Coordination: Define UAT test cases, coordinate testing with business users, and validate that delivered solutions meet the defined acceptance criteria.


Requirements


	
	Experience: 4-7 years of combined experience as a Business Analyst and/or Product Manager, specifically within the Banking or Financial Services industry. Experience in microfinance or digital lending is highly preferred.
	


Product Skills:


	Proven ability to define product strategy and manage a product roadmap.
	Experience with product analytics tools and data-driven decision-making.
	Familiarity with UX design principles and customer-centric development.


Technical &amp; Analytical Skills:


	Proficiency in SQL for data analysis and reporting.
	Experience with Core Banking Systems (e.g., T24, Finacle, Flexcube, or any microfinance-specific platform).
	Knowledge of API integrations, payment gateways (NIBSS, Remita), and digital channels.
	Proficiency in product/project management tools.
	Domain Knowledge: Deep understanding of lending operations, deposit mobilization, and regulatory compliance (Central Bank of Nigeria guidelines) as they relate to technology.


Soft Skills:


	Strong leadership and influencing skills, with the ability to drive consensus among diverse stakeholders.
	Excellent communication skills, capable of presenting to senior management and explaining technical concepts to non-technical users.
	Highly organized, able to manage multiple products and projects simultaneously in a hybrid work environment.

Product Analyst Job at Source Microfinance Bank




        
    

        
        Source Microfinance Bank is a digital bank with a focus on how to serve you better always! At Source Credit, we have our plans to serve you better right at the center of all we do, and our service offerings. We also ensure we give the best customer service experience that is tailored just for you. Source Microfinance Bank is poised to change the face of banking in Nigeria. We are reinventing banking to empower a generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Product Analyst

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-Time

Job Description
Product Management:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Product Strategy & Roadmap: Define the product vision, strategy, and roadmap for digital channels (mobile app, USSD, internet banking) and internal operational tools in alignment with business goals.
	Market Research: Conduct competitor analysis and market research to identify trends, customer pain points, and opportunities for innovation in the microfinance space.
	Backlog Ownership: Own and prioritize the product backlog, balancing business value, technical feasibility, and regulatory requirements.
	Performance Monitoring: Define Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for products (e.g., adoption rates, transaction volumes, user satisfaction) and use data to drive iterative improvements.
	Go-to-Market Support: Collaborate with marketing and operations to launch new features, create training materials, and ensure successful adoption by both staff and customers.


Business Analysis:


	Requirements Elicitation: Work with stakeholders (Credit, Operations, Risk, Finance) to capture detailed functional and non-functional requirements for new features and system enhancements.
	Process Optimization: Analyze current workflows within the Core Banking System (CBS) and lending processes, identifying bottlenecks and recommending automated solutions.
	Documentation: Translate product vision into detailed user stories, Business Requirement Documents (BRDs), and Functional Specifications for the development team.
	Stakeholder Communication: Act as the primary liaison between business units and the technical team, ensuring clear communication and managing expectations throughout the development cycle.
	UAT Coordination: Define UAT test cases, coordinate testing with business users, and validate that delivered solutions meet the defined acceptance criteria.


Requirements


	
	Experience: 4-7 years of combined experience as a Business Analyst and/or Product Manager, specifically within the Banking or Financial Services industry. Experience in microfinance or digital lending is highly preferred.
	


Product Skills:


	Proven ability to define product strategy and manage a product roadmap.
	Experience with product analytics tools and data-driven decision-making.
	Familiarity with UX design principles and customer-centric development.


Technical & Analytical Skills:


	Proficiency in SQL for data analysis and reporting.
	Experience with Core Banking Systems (e.g., T24, Finacle, Flexcube, or any microfinance-specific platform).
	Knowledge of API integrations, payment gateways (NIBSS, Remita), and digital channels.
	Proficiency in product/project management tools.
	Domain Knowledge: Deep understanding of lending operations, deposit mobilization, and regulatory compliance (Central Bank of Nigeria guidelines) as they relate to technology.


Soft Skills:


	Strong leadership and influencing skills, with the ability to drive consensus among diverse stakeholders.
	Excellent communication skills, capable of presenting to senior management and explaining technical concepts to non-technical users.
	Highly organized, able to manage multiple products and projects simultaneously in a hybrid work environment.
